description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On Saturday, February 21, 2026 (Reiwa 8), from 10:00 a.m. to 3:00 p.m., Hanno City held the "2025 Lifelong Learning Festival" at Hanno Civic Hall and Hanno Central Park.

The festival provided a venue for citizens to practice, showcase, and exchange their learning activities, as well as a space to introduce lifelong learning to new participants. Many visitors of all ages—from children to adults—attended.

【Lectures】
• Super Beginner: Enjoy Learning with Easy Mountain Hiking! Tenranzan Mountain and Hanno's Mountains
• Learning About Money Together—Kids and Adults

【Experience Booths】
Main Hall Foyer: Brain training games, hinoki (Japanese cypress) spinning tops and magnets
Small Hall: Taiko drum festival music experience, mock performances by local folk arts preservation groups
Small Hall Foyer: Museum exhibit guide, foster care system awareness display
Basement Exhibition Room: Go (board game) experience, slime making
Hanno Central Park: Hockey experience, mölkky experience

Food and beverage vendors also operated at the venue.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kyoikubu/syogaigakusyu-sports/shogaigakushu/11259.html
summary: ℹ️ Hanno City held its 2025 Lifelong Learning Festival
